title: Powers of commissioners
doc_html:
§1134.  Powers of commissioners

The commissioners shall have powers of amicable compounders, and shall have the right to subpoena witnesses and documents, and to punish for failure to appear or present the documents, in the same manner as is now provided in such cases before courts, under existing laws.
doc_text:
§1134.  Powers of commissioners
The commissioners shall have powers of amicable compounders, and shall have the right to subpoena witnesses and documents, and to punish for failure to appear or present the documents, in the same manner as is now provided in such cases before courts, under existing laws.
